card.name: CW01 Courtyard Lookout
card.text: Vigilance {2}{S}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. ({S} is mana from a snow source.)

card.name: CW02 Vision of Hope
card.text: Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: CW03 Snowslope Hunter
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: CW04 Crag Mystic
card.text: Whenever an enchantment you control enters, you gain 1 life and scry 1.

card.name: CW05 Winterglade Infantry
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Solstice — Once each turn, when you cast a snow spell or attack with another snow creature, target creature gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: CW06 Tallian Cuirassier
card.text: {1}{W}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: CW07 Steppe Patrol
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, put a flying counter on target creature you control.

card.name: CW08 Treeline Refugees
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. If your allegiance to Spirits is 5 or greater, create two of those tokens instead. (Your allegiance to Spirits is the total power of Spirits you control.)

card.name: CW09 Tundra Sentry
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, if your allegiance to Knights is 6 or greater, other creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. (Your allegiance to Knights is the total power of Knights you control.)

card.name: CW10 Godblood Raptor
card.text: Flying, lifelink {2S}{W}: Tap target creature an opponent controls. Activate only once each turn. ({S} is mana from a snow source.)

card.name: CW11 Speaker of the Blood Frost
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if an enchantment you control entered this turn. Vigilance

card.name: CW12 Repel the Cursed
card.text: Repel the Cursed deals damage to target attacking or blocking creature equal to the number of creatures and/or enchantments you control.

card.name: CW13 To Fight Again
card.text: Return target enchantment or creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. That permanent gains ward {1} until your next turn. (Whenever that permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)

card.name: CW14 Glorious Memoriam
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. As long as it's attacking, it also has first strike. Vestige (When enchanted creature dies, if it wasn't a token, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Return this Aura to the battlefield attached to it.)

card.name: CW15 Frozen Over
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield if it's a creature or if {S} was spent to cast this spell. You gain 2 life. ({S} is mana from a snow source.)

card.name: CU01 Frostbitten Rampart
card.text: Defender Ambition (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a level counter on this creature.) [1/4] [level 1-2] Defender [2/4] [level 3+] [4/4]

card.name: CU02 Shoal Inquisitors
card.text: When this creature enters, target player mills two cards. {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: CU03 Iceheart Aspect
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. If {S} was spent to cast this spell, put a stun counter on it. ({S} is mana from a snow source.)

card.name: CU04 Whistlewind Aven
card.text: Flying As long as your allegiance to Warlocks is 4 or greater, noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. (Your allegiance to Warlocks is the total power of Warlocks you control.)

card.name: CU05 Enndemere Waterwatch
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, surveil 1. If your allegiance to Merfolk is 4 or greater, surveil 2 instead. (Your allegiance to Merfolk is the total power of Merfolk you control.)

card.name: CU06 Rimeveil Terrier
card.text: When this creature enters, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand. If that creature had mana value 2 or less, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {4}{S}: Draw a card. ({S} is mana from a snow source.)

card.name: CU07 Ordhenn Exalt
card.text: Ambition (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a level counter on this creature.) [3/5] [level 1-3] Flying [4/6] [level 4+] Flying [6/6]

card.name: CU08 Seaguild Matron
card.text: Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.) {1}{U}, Discard this card: Target creature gains hexproof until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CU09 Enhance
card.text: Choose up to one target creature you control. Give it another counter of each kind already there. Draw a card.

card.name: CU10 Twilight's Will
card.text: Counter target spell. You may pay {1}. If you do, create a 1/1 black Warlock creature token.

card.name: UU11 Right the Balance
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. • Return target noncreature, nonland card from your graveyard to your hand. You can't cast spells with the same name as that card this turn.

card.name: CU13 Search for Signs
card.text: Draw two cards. Solstice — {1}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card, then discard a card. Activate only if you cast another snow spell or attacked with a snow creature this turn.

card.name: CU12 Fall Through
card.text: Target player mills four cards. Up to one target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: CU14 Angelic Memoriam
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Vestige (When enchanted creature dies, if it wasn't a token, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Return this Aura to the battlefield attached to it.)

card.name: CU15 Ensconce in Ice
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, return all other permanents attached to enchanted creature to their owners' hands. Enchanted creature gets -5/-0 and loses all abilities.

card.name: CB01 Tombstone Penitent
card.text: Whenever one or more snow creatures you control die, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: CB02 Bloodcoat Guide
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CB03 Restless Legionnaire
card.text: Deathtouch {1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. {2}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black Knight creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CB04 Marrow Drifter
card.text: Ambition (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a level counter on this creature.) [2/3] [level 1-2] Menace [2/3] [level 3+] Lifelink, menace [3/4]

card.name: CB05 Evoke Old Magic
card.text: Create a 2/2 black Horror creature token with flying. Flashback {4}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: CB06 Blackstar Faithful
card.text: Menace Solstice — Once each turn, when you cast a snow spell or attack with another snow creature, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CB07 Squall Witch
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target Warlock you control. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if your allegiance to Warlocks is 5 or greater, target player loses 2 life. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Your allegiance to Warlocks is the total power of Warlocks you control.)

card.name: CB08 Steelfang Vulture
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, mill three cards. You may return a creature card milled this way to your hand.

card.name: CB09 Tether Keeper
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. {B}, Exile two nonland cards from your graveyard: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: CB10 Calcify
card.text: Destroy target creature or enchantment if it has mana value 2 or less or if you control a permanent with one or more counters on it.

card.name: CB11 Bear the Cold
card.text: Each opponent loses 2 life. The next time target creature you control dies this turn, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. If {S} was spent to cast this spell, it enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. ({S} is mana from a snow source.)

card.name: CB12 Lost in Enndemere
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if your allegiance to Knights is 3 or greater. (Your allegiance to Knights is the total power of Knights you control.) Exile target creature.

card.name: CB13 Dance of Fallen Kin
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Flashback {2}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: CB14 Grisly Memoriam
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+2 and has deathtouch and lifelink. Vestige (When enchanted creature dies, if it wasn't a token, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Return this Aura to the battlefield attached to it.)

card.name: CB15 Days of Mourning
card.text: Draw two cards. You lose 2 life unless this spell was cast from your graveyard. Flashback—{1}{B}, Sacrifice a creature. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: CR01 Ghost Sigil Champion
card.text: Haste Ambition (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a level counter on this creature.) [1/1] [level 1-2] Haste [2/2] [level 3+] Menace, haste [3/2]

card.name: CR02 Equinox Aspirant
card.text: Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it deals 1 damage to target player.

card.name: CR03 Spiteful Bladesmith
card.text: {T}: Target creature you control gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: CR04 Exhelian Linebreaker
card.text: When this creature enters, discard a card, then draw a card. Ambition (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a level counter on this creature.) [3/2] [level 1-3] Menace [4/3] [level 4+] Menace [5/5]

card.name: CR05 Hollowbone Consul
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Whenever this creature attacks, if your allegiance to Spirits is 4 or greater, create a Treasure token. (Your allegiance to Spirits is the total power of Spirits you control.)

card.name: CR06 Steppe Howler
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, if its power is greater than its base power, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: CR09 Emblazoned Ash
card.text: Reach {2}{R}: Up to two target creatures each get +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CR07 Linden Tracker
card.text: When this creature enters, put your choice of a +1/+1 counter or a trample counter on it. You may put both on it instead if your allegiance to Wolves is 6 or greater. (Your allegiance to Wolves is the total power of Wolves you control.)

card.name: CR08 Soulcave Gauntlet
card.text: Create a 4/4 red Beast creature token with "This creature can't block." Flashback {6}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: CR10 Blood Arts
card.text: Blood Arts deals X plus 1 damage to target creature, where X is the number of counters on permanents you control.

card.name: CR12 Remnants' Devotion
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. A creature cast this way enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CR11 Bombard
card.text: Bombard deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: CR13 Stellata's Last Will
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. Flashback {3}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: CR14 Vengeant Memoriam
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has menace. Vestige (When enchanted creature dies, if it wasn't a token, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Return this Aura to the battlefield attached to it.)

card.name: CR15 Jagged Blaze
card.text: Jagged Blaze deals 6 damage to target creature. Distribute two +1/+1 counters among up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: CG01 Vista Tenders
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, you gain 1 life.

card.name: CG02 Rotpack Scout
card.text: Deathtouch {5}{G}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CG03 Siltcurrent Sage
card.text: When this creature enters, mill a card. {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: CG04 Mossmane Liaison
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, if its power is greater than its base power, untap it.

card.name: CG05 Deepcover Harpoonist
card.text: Reach {3}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card. This ability costs {2} less to activate if your allegiance to Merfolk is 4 or greater. (Your allegiance to Merfolk is the total power of Merfolk you control.)

card.name: CG06 Ivory Collector
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. You may return a land card milled this way to your hand. Whenever you mill one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: CG07 Voice of Broken Earth
card.text: As long as you control another enchantment, this creature gets +1/+1 and has trample.

card.name: CG08 Rotpack Guardian
card.text: As long as your allegiance to Wolves is 7 or greater, this creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. (Your allegiance to Wolves is the total power of Wolves you control.) {2}{G}, Discard this card: Create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token.

card.name: CG09 Soulgorger Wurm
card.text: Vigilance, reach When this creature enters, you gain 2 life. If a card entered or left your graveyard this turn, you gain 5 life instead.

card.name: CG10 Ordhenn Colossus
card.text: Trample Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CG11 Hold Firm
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn. Untap it. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: CG12 Hymn of Second Dawn
card.text: Mill two cards. You may put a basic land card from your graveyard onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't, draw a card.

card.name: CG13 Chase Into Death
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {1} or exile a nonland card from your graveyard. Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: CG14 Primal Memoriam
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+1 and has trample. Vestige (When enchanted creature dies, if it wasn't a token, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Return this Aura to the battlefield attached to it.)

card.name: CG15 Boreal Grove
card.text: Enchant land When this enchantment enters, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {G}. (This counts as mana from a snow source.)

card.name: CU11 Channel the Ulderlords
card.text: Counter target noncreature, nonartifact spell. If that spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: UB05
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, the next flashback cost you pay this turn costs {2} less.

card.name: UB11
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it with mana value less than or equal to your allegiance to Warlocks. That player discards that card. (Your allegiance to Warlocks is the total power of Warlocks you control.)

card.name: UR09
card.text: UR09 deals damage to target creature equal to your allegiance to Spirits. (Your allegiance to Spirits is the total power of Spirits you control.)

card.name: UM11
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, return target creature to its owner's hand unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: UM14
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if your allegiance to Wolves is 4 or greater. (Your allegiance to Wolves is the total power of Wolves you control.) Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: UM15
card.text: Vigilance Whenever an enchantment you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, you gain 2 life.

card.name: UM16 Astir's Cavalry
card.text: First strike, menace Solstice — Once each turn, when you cast a snow spell or attack with a snow creature, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: UM10 Ideologue of the Cycle
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. Return a creature or land card from among the milled cards to your hand. Whenever you mill two or more cards, untap target permanent. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: RM01 Kiala, Bark and Blood
card.text: Trample Whenever an Aura you control enters, draw a card. Whenever a creature you control attacks, if its power is greater than its base power, it deals damage to defending player equal to the difference.

card.name: CA01 Rockfield Watch
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. {2}, Remove a counter from this creature: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CA02 Unformed Wanderer
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {2}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: CA03 Rimeveil Sentry
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature you don't control. {2}, {T}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: CA04 Palefire Greatsword
card.text: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target Spirit or Knight you control. Equipped creature gets +2/+0. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: CA05 Ghost Sigil Totem
card.text: Solstice — Whenever you cast a snow spell or attack with a snow creature, surveil 1. This ability triggers only once each turn. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: CL01
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: UL01
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: UM20 Ensorcell
card.text: Counter target permanent spell.

card.name: UM09 Brightblood Oracle
card.text: Flying, haste Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: UM07
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: UM06 Astir's Cavalry
card.text: First strike, menace Solstice — Once each turn, when you cast a snow spell or attack with another snow creature, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: UM05 Glimpse of Edran
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance. Vestige (When enchanted creature dies, if it wasn't a token, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Return this Aura to the battlefield attached to it.)

card.name: UM04
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Whenever a creature you control attacks, if its power is greater than its base power, it gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: UM01
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, return target creature or spell to its owner's hand unless its controller pays {1}.
